mapper.select:
SELECT d.id, d.id_site, d.devicename AS name, d.id_device_group, d.datatablename, d.view_tablename, d.id_device_type, d.hidden, d.reverse_poa, dg.group_name, d.is_weather_to_calculate_expected, IFNULL(dt.title_trans, "N/A") AS type_title_trans, IFNULL(dg.title_trans, "N/A") AS group_title_trans, dg.table_name, dt.name AS device_type_name, dt.order, s.table_data_virtual, JSON_ARRAYAGG(JSON_OBJECT( 'id', dp.id, 'name', , 'slug', dp.slug, 'id_device_group', d.id_device_group, 'unit', dp.unit, 'is_checked', dp.is_checked, 'id_generic_parameter', gp.id, 'generic_parameter_name', gp.name, 'id_generic_parameter_type', gp.id_generic_parameter_type, 'value_chart_tool', dp.value_chart_tool, 'min_value', IFNULL(dpf.min_value, 0.001), 'max_value', IFNULL(dpf.max_value, 0.001), 'rounding_decimals', dp.rounding_decimals )) AS parameters, 0 AS checked FROM device d LEFT JOIN device_group dg ON d.id_device_group = dg.id LEFT JOIN device_parameters dp ON dp.id_device_group = dg.id LEFT JOIN device_parameter_filter dpf ON dp.id = dpf.id_device_parameter AND d.id = dpf.id_device LEFT JOIN generic_parameters gp ON gp.id = dp.id_generic_parameter LEFT JOIN device_type dt ON dt.id = d.id_device_type LEFT JOIN site s ON d.id_site = s.id LEFT JOIN time_zone t ON t.id = s.id_time_zone WHERE SHA1(d.id_site) = #{hash_id_site} AND d.status = 1 AND d.is_delete = 0 AND d.id_device_type != 5 AND s.status = 1 AND s.is_delete = 0 AND dp.status = 1 AND dp.is_delete = 0 AND dp.is_filter = 1 AND (CONVERT_TZ(NOW(), 'UTC', t.value) < s.expiration OR s.expiration IS NULL)
GROUP BY d.id ORDER BY dt.order ASC, d.devicename ASC
SELECT date_from, date_to FROM hidden_data WHERE id_device = #{id} AND status = 1 AND is_delete = 0

when.test: (filterBy == '3_day' or filterBy == 'this_week' or filterBy == 'last_week') and data_send_time == 8
(filterBy == '3_day' or filterBy == 'this_week' or filterBy == 'last_week') and data_send_time == 1
(filterBy == '3_day' or filterBy == 'this_week' or filterBy == 'last_week') and data_send_time == 2
(filterBy == '3_day' or filterBy == 'this_week' or filterBy == 'last_week') and data_send_time == 3
(filterBy == '3_day' or filterBy == 'this_week' or filterBy == 'last_week') and data_send_time == 4

(filterBy == 'this_month' or filterBy == 'last_month' or filterBy == '12_month' or filterBy == 'year' or filterBy == 'lifetime' or filterBy == 'custom') and (data_send_time == 8 or data_send_time == 1 or data_send_time == 2 or data_send_time == 3 or data_send_time == 4)

choose.when: CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(#{end_date}, #{start_date}) <= 44 THEN DATE_FORMAT( ${time}, '%m/%d' ) ELSE DATE_FORMAT( ${time}, '%b. %Y' ) END

when.test: (filterBy == 'this_month' or filterBy == 'last_month' or filterBy == '12_month' or filterBy == 'year' or filterBy == 'lifetime' or filterBy == 'custom') and data_send_time == 5

choose.when: CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(#{end_date}, #{start_date}) <= 44 THEN DATE_FORMAT( DATE_SUB(${time}, INTERVAL (MOD(DATEDIFF(${time}, #{start_date}), 7 )) DAY), '%m/%d' ) ELSE DATE_FORMAT( ${time}, '%b. %Y' ) END

when.test: (filterBy == '12_month' or filterBy == 'year' or filterBy == 'lifetime' or filterBy == 'custom') and data_send_time == 6

mapper.sql:
( LAG(MAX(time), 1) OVER (ORDER BY time) IS NULL OR (
MINUTE(FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( MIN(${time}) ) DIV 900 )* 900, '%H:%i:%s' )) = 0
FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( MIN(${time}) ) DIV 900 )* 900, '%H:%i:%s' ) = '00:00:00'
DATE_FORMAT(MIN(${time}), '%Y-%m-%d') = AND FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( MIN(${time}) ) DIV 900 )* 900, '%H:%i:%s' ) = '00:00:00'
DAYOFMONTH(MIN(${time})) = 1 AND FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( MIN(${time}) ) DIV 900 )* 900, '%H:%i:%s' ) = '00:00:00'
DAYOFYEAR(MIN(${time})) = 1 AND FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( MIN(${time}) ) DIV 900 )* 900, '%H:%i:%s' ) = '00:00:00'
1
) )

( LEAD(MIN(time), 1) OVER (ORDER BY time) IS NOT NULL AND
( data_send_time = 1 OR data_send_time = 2 OR = )
( data_send_time = 2 OR = )
= AND MINUTE(FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( LEAD(MIN(${time}), 1) OVER (ORDER BY time) ) DIV 900 )* 900, '%H:%i:%s' )) = 0
= AND FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( LEAD(MIN(${time}), 1) OVER (ORDER BY time) ) DIV 900 )* 900, '%H:%i:%s' ) = '00:00:00'
= AND FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( LEAD(MIN(${time}), 1) OVER (ORDER BY time) ) DIV 900 )* 900, '%H:%i:%s' ) = '00:00:00'
= AND DAYOFMONTH(LEAD(MIN(${time}), 1) OVER (ORDER BY time)) = 1 AND FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( LEAD(MIN(${time}), 1) OVER (ORDER BY time) ) DIV 900 )* 900, '%H:%i:%s' ) = '00:00:00'
= AND DAYOFYEAR(LEAD(MIN(${time}), 1) OVER (ORDER BY time)) = 1 AND FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( LEAD(MIN(${time}), 1) OVER (ORDER BY time) ) DIV 900 )* 900, '%H:%i:%s' ) = '00:00:00'
1
)

SELECT SUM(value) AS value, time_group_by_interval FROM ( SELECT AVG(dv.nvm_irradiance) / 1000 AS value, DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%Y-%m-%d %H:00' ) AS time_group_by_hour, DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%Y-%m-%d') AS time_group_by_day, AS time_group_by_interval FROM ${datatablename} dv JOIN device d ON d.id = dv.id_device JOIN site s ON s.id = d.id_site JOIN time_zone t ON t.id = s.id_time_zone WHERE dv.id_device = #{id} AND dv.time BETWEEN CONVERT_TZ(#{start_date}, t.value, 'UTC') AND CONVERT_TZ(#{end_date}, t.value, 'UTC') GROUP BY time_group_by_hour ) t GROUP BY
time_group_by_day time_group_by_interval

SELECT AVG(value) AS value, time_group_by_interval FROM (
) t GROUP BY time_group_by_interval
mapper.select: SELECT id, id_employee, id_site, params, DATE_FORMAT(created_date, "%m/%d/%Y %H:%i:%s") AS created_date, name, is_favorite FROM employee_chart_filter WHERE id_employee = #{id_employee} AND SHA1(id_site) = #{hash_id_site} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO employee_chart_filter ( `id_employee`, `id_site`, `params`, `created_date`, `name`, `is_favorite` ) SELECT #{id_employee} AS id_employee, id AS id_site, #{params} AS params, #{created_date} AS created_date, #{name} AS name, #{is_favorite} AS is_favorite FROM site WHERE SHA1(id) = #{hash_id_site};
mapper.select:
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(CONVERT_TZ(time, 'UTC', #{timezone_value}), '%H:00') AS categories_time, DATE_FORMAT(CONVERT_TZ(time, 'UTC', #{timezone_value}), '%Y-%m-%d %H:00') AS time_full, (
) AS actual FROM ${datatablename} dv JOIN ( SELECT ( LEAD(MIN(time), 1) OVER (ORDER BY time) IS NOT NULL AND DATE_FORMAT( DATE_ADD(MIN(time), INTERVAL 1 HOUR), '%Y-%m-%d %H:00' ) = DATE_FORMAT( LEAD(MIN(time), 1) OVER (ORDER BY time), '%Y-%m-%d %H:00' ) AND MINUTE(FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( LEAD(MIN(time), 1) OVER (ORDER BY time) ) DIV 900 )* 900, '%H:%i:%s' )) = 0 ) AS leadTimeValid, MIN(dv.time) AS minTime, MAX(dv.time) AS maxTime FROM ${datatablename} dv WHERE dv.id_device = #{id} AND time BETWEEN CONVERT_TZ(#{start_date}, #{timezone_value}, 'UTC') AND CONVERT_TZ(#{end_date}, #{timezone_value}, 'UTC') AND dv.nvmActiveEnergy IS NOT NULL GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(CONVERT_TZ(time, 'UTC', #{timezone_value}), '%Y-%m-%d %H:00') ) m ON m.minTime = dv.time AND dv.id_device = #{id}
